subject: Computer Networking
title: Smart NICs and DPUs
description: A quick win: understand Smart NICs and DPUs.

hook.text: What if your network card had its own processor? Smart NICs offload work from the CPU to the card.

buildup.text: Traditional NICs just send and receive. Smart NICs — DPUs — filter, encrypt, and route on-card.

discovery.text: Cloud providers use DPUs to isolate tenant traffic in hardware. The server CPU runs only customer work.

twist.text: NVIDIA BlueField and AMD Pensando run a full network OS on a chip smaller than a credit card.

climax.text: Offloading to the DPU frees 10-30% server CPU. In a data center, that translates to billions saved.

punchline.text: Smart NICs do the networking so the CPU doesn't have to.

quiz.question: What is the main benefit of a DPU in cloud data centers?
options: It frees the server CPU by offloading network processing to the card
It replaces the need for network cables
It provides wireless connectivity to servers
